authority.department: Labour Resources Department, Government of Bihar

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Bihar.

rules.title: Review Bihar Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Bihar Shops and Establishments legislation is applicable.

citations.reference: Applicable Bihar Shops and Establishments legislation

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain all registers, employment records and notices prescribed under Bihar labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display all statutory notices required under Bihar labour laws at the workplace.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Leave and Weekly Holiday Requirements
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Bihar-specific provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

citations.reference: Applicable Bihar Shops and Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Labour Welfare Fund Requirements
rules.description: Review whether any Bihar-specific labour welfare obligations or contributions apply to the establishment.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct a yearly audit covering labour registrations, statutory records and employment documentation.

recommended.title: Digital Statutory Register Management
recommended.description: Maintain digital statutory registers and a compliance calendar for inspections and renewals.
